title: comparison in where clause (left-side multiplication, right-side cosine and sql function with column argument) crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE images (imageid INT, ds_id INT, bmaj DOUBLE, PRIMARY KEY (imageid));

CREATE TABLE xtrsrc (xtrsrcid INT, image_id INT, zone INT, ra DOUBLE, decl DOUBLE, ra_err DOUBLE, decl_err DOUBLE, x DOUBLE, y DOUBLE, z DOUBLE, PRIMARY KEY (xtrsrcid), FOREIGN KEY (image_id) REFERENCES images (imageid));
SELECT xtrsrcid FROM xtrsrc WHERE x * x + y * y + z * z > COS(RADIANS((SELECT bmaj FROM images WHERE imageid = 1)));
key_bug_features: comparison in where clause with multiplication and cosine
